calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Santions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Susan Ann D'Arcangelo, Defendant appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Carlos Adolfo Hernandez Cruz's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
